BusinessName.BusinessNameLine1Txt: ROUND VALLEY INDIAN HEALTH CENTER INC

IRS990.ActivityOrMissionDesc: Out patient Medical/Dental/Health Facility- To Provide Low Cost Primary Health Care services to Native Americans and other medically underserves rural residents of Covelo and Round Valley, California
IRS990.MissionDesc: PROVIDE LOW COST PRIMARY HEALTH CARE SERVICES TO NATIVE AMERICANS AND OTHER MEDICALLY UNDERSERVEDRURAL RESIDENTS OF COVELO AND ROUND VALLEY, CALIFORNIA
IRS990.Desc: THROUGH CONTRACT WITH INDIAN HEALTH SERVICES, DHHS-USA, VARIOUS HEALTH CARE SERVICES ARE PROVIDED TO NATIVE INDIANS WHO ARE RESIDENTS OF ROUND VALLEY, CALIFORNIA. SUCH SERVICES INCLUDE PRIMARY HEALTHCARE DENTAL AND VISION. PROGRAM ALSO PROVIDE SUBSTANCE ABUSE COUNSELING CLINIC SERVICES, CONTRACT HEALTH SERVICES

ProgSrvcAccomActy2Grp.Desc: PATIENTS BILLING-THE CLINIC ALSO PROVIDES LOW COST PRIMARY HEALTH CARE SERVICES TO ALL LOCAL RESIDENTS THAT ARE AMONG THE UNDERSERVED LOW INCOME POPULATION. THE INCOME DERIVED IS PRIVATE PATIENTS FEES, MEDICARE, MEDICAL, INSURANCE BILLING CLAIMS. SELF PAY etc.

ProgSrvcAccomActy3Grp.Desc: Through US Department of Health and Human Services contract funding under the Special Diabetes Program for Indians, the Clinic provides various educational programs and activities to treat and manage the diabetes among the qualifying local native Indian residents.

ProgSrvcAccomActyOtherGrp.Desc: Various other Healthcare, Welfare and Education related programs with the Primary objective of serving the local indigenous and resident Indians of the Round Valley and Covelo area

OtherExpensesGrp.Desc: Contract Hlth, Substance Abuse & Emergency Services
Rent, Utilities, Bld & Equip Maint, Telephone, etc
Medical Waste, Laboratory , Patients Transport Etc.

InvstProgramRelatedOrgGrp.Desc: Growth and Income Mutual Funds, MM Funds, etc

SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: Since the Clinic is located in remote rural area it is necessary and a requirement that outside area physicians and dentist reside in the clinic provided residences.
The Job Position- Duties, Responsibilities and Compensation are discussed and approved by the Board

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: Form 990, Part VI, Section A, Line 8b
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: Each Committee does not have authority to act on behalf of the governing body

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: Form 990, Part VI, Section B, Line 11b
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: Before filing the Form 990 and related schedules etc. Tax Returns are reviewed by the Fiscal Officer and a copies are made available to the Executive Director and the Board Members

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: Form 990, Part VI, Section C, Line 19
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: The Governing Documents, Conflict of Interest Policy, and Financial Statements are made available to the public upon written request

These Other services are Locum Doctors and other Health Providers $588,420, Contract IT and Network Support Services and Patients Billings Services $547,170, and Others Professional and Contract Services $95,921..

ReasonableCauseExplanation.ExplanationTxt: This Federal Return filing is late as there was sickness/vacancy experienced in our fiscal department, and thus could not file the extension due on or by November 15, 2024. Also, since the entity is located in remote rural area there is significant difficulties in hiring adequate staffing. In the past the entity has normally filed extension by the due date and hardly filed late. We would sincerely appreciate kind consideration of our circumstances and waive the late filing penalties. Thank you
